# PropertyHack - Full LLM Reference

> Agenda-free Australian property news, market updates, and analysis.

## About

PropertyHack is an AI-powered property news aggregation platform for Australia. It collects articles from multiple sources (RSS feeds, news APIs, web scraping), AI-summarises them using Google Gemini, and serves them in a clean, location-aware news feed. All content is property-market focused.

## Article Structure

Each article includes:
- **title**: Headline of the article
- **shortBlurb**: 1-2 sentence summary (AI-generated)
- **longSummary**: Detailed AI-generated summary (2-4 paragraphs)
- **category**: Property market category (e.g. Market Trends, Finance, Investment, Rental Market)
- **location**: Australian city or region
- **source**: Original publication name
- **sourceUrl**: Link to original article for attribution
- **publishedAt**: Publication date/time (ISO 8601)
- **imageUrl**: Article hero image
- **imageAltText**: Descriptive alt text for the image

## Location Coverage

Nine major Australian cities and regions:
Sydney, Melbourne, Brisbane, Perth, Adelaide, Canberra, Hobart, Darwin, Gold Coast

## Public API Reference

Base URL: `https://propertyhack.com.au/api/public`

### GET /articles
Returns paginated property news articles.

Query parameters:
- `page` (integer, default 1)
- `limit` (integer, default 20, max 50)
- `search` (string) - full-text search on title and summary
- `location` (string) - filter by city slug (e.g. `sydney`, `gold-coast`)
- `category` (string) - filter by category slug

### GET /articles/:slug
Returns a single article by slug with full content.

## Feeds

- RSS 2.0: `https://propertyhack.com.au/feed.xml`
- Sitemap index: `https://propertyhack.com.au/sitemap.xml`
- Articles sitemap: `https://propertyhack.com.au/sitemap-articles.xml`
- Google News sitemap: `https://propertyhack.com.au/sitemap-news.xml`

## Editorial Policy

PropertyHack does not have a financial stake in any property outcome. Content is sourced from established Australian property and financial media and AI-summarised to be concise and readable. Source attribution is always included.
